name: part_container_classifier
description: Proxy-label classifier that predicts a compact part-container class from correlated features such as size, retail price, and case indicators.
comment: Kept as a proxy-label benchmark to test whether coarse part attributes carry enough signal to predict container category on held-out rows.
target_expression: CASE WHEN p_container LIKE '%SM%' THEN 0 WHEN p_container LIKE '%MED%' THEN 1 WHEN p_container LIKE '%LG%' THEN 2 ELSE 3 END
